Brace Yourself Games x hololive Collaboration: hololive DLC Pack Comes to Rift of the NecroDancer! | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
hololive Gen 0 Octopus Card Pre-Sale! - カバー株式会社
hololive Gen 0 Octopus Card Pre-Sale! | NEWS | hololive official website - hololive.hololivepro.com
hololive Gen 0 Octopus Card Pre-Sale!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: COVER Corporation has officially announced an extended collaboration between hololive production and Octopus Card, unveiling a series of exclusive physical Octopus card-sets featuring the beloved talents of hololive Gen 0. Pre-orders for this special edition are now available at: https://pump-water.com/product-category/hololiveThe hololive Gen 0 Octopus Card set is available in two editions: a and a , perfect for both practical users and passionate collectors. Showcasing Gen 0 members in classic Hong Kong-style outfits, take them along as you wander the streets, savour local delicacies, and make them part of your everyday life!Special Edition Octopus Single Card SetSet Includes: ・ hololive Gen 0 Special Edition Octopus Card ・ Octopus Card Holder with Lanyard*Designs under supervisionSpecial Edition Octopus Collector SetSet Includes: ・ hololive Gen 0 Special Edition Octopus Card ・ Magnetic Octopus Card Holder ・ Card Display Stand ・ Acrylic Shikishi Artboard ・ Gift Box PackagingPre-order your exclusive Octopus Card to take Gen 0 talents with you wherever you go! The products will be available for purchase on Pump-Water.com, the platform dedicated to licensed anime merchandise. *Designs under supervisionOctopus is a contactless stored value card that provides customers with a simple, safe, and secure way to pay. First launched in 1997 across public transport systems, the applications of the Octopus card have since expanded to include retail stores and various facilities, making everyday life more convenient.

item.title: Brace Yourself Games x hololive Collaboration: hololive DLC Pack Comes to Rift of the NecroDancer! | NEWS - ホロライブ公式サイト
Brace Yourself Games x hololive Collaboration: hololive DLC Pack Comes to Rift of the NecroDancer!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: June 25, 2025 – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced a collaboration between Brace Yourself Games and hololive production. An all-new downloadable content (DLC) pack featuring hololive talents will be added to Rift of the NecroDancer, the game. The collaboration will launch simultaneously on Steam and Nintendo Switch on June 25th.Players will be able to sync the beat to five brand-new tracks featuring from hololive talents – including the graduated Gawr Gura. As a special promotion for this exciting crossover, the track “REFLECT” by Gawr Gura will be available to all Rift of the NecroDancer players to download for free.The full lineup of songs in the hololive Music Pack includes: ・ “REFLECT” by Gawr Gura (Free to download!) ・ “BIBBIDIBA” by Hoshimachi Suisei ・ “Ahoy!! 我ら宝鐘海賊団☆” by Houshou Marine ・ “Play Dice!” by Hakos Baelz ・ “Carbonated Love” by IRySEach song will be available for individual purchase at $1.99 USD, or fans can grab the entire collection as a bundle for a 25% discount. We hope you enjoy it! The hololive DLC drops on Steam and Nintendo Switch on June 25th.

hololive English -Justice- Announces 3D Showcase Schedule! - ホロライブ公式サイト
hololive English -Justice- Announces 3D Showcase Schedule! - カバー株式会社
COVER Corporation Announces hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One-! | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
hololive English -Justice- Announces 3D Showcase Schedule!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: June 16, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan, CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) today announced the hololive English -Justice-’s 3D Showcase Schedule, kicking off with Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame on August 1st, Gigi Murin on August 2nd, Cecilia Immergreen on August 8th, Raora Panthera on August 9th, and a 3D Collaboration on August 16th. (PDT)hololive English -Justice- talents Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, and Raora Panthera will star in their individual 3D Showcases, followed by a 3D Collaboration livestream together.The 3D showcases for hololive English -Justice- members and their collaboration stream will feature various contents and performances from each of the talents. The four talents will also be joining their fellow hololive English members in the upcoming hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One- event, announced to be happening later in August. hololive English -Justice- 3D Showcase

item.title: COVER Corporation Announces hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One-!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: June 16, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced that hololive English will be holding their third concert event, hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One-, on August 23rd and 24th at the Radio City Music Hall in New York, NY, over the span of two days.The concert will feature the members of hololive English, including members of hololive English -Justice-, who will be debuting in 3D before the performance during the month of August 2025. More details regarding their upcoming 3D debuts can be found here.“Our staff have been working hard to make this concert even more enjoyable than previous ones, so please look forward to it! If you can’t make it there, we hope you will tune in via livestreaming,” commented Motoaki Tanigo, CEO, COVER Corporation.Additional updates will be shared through hololive English’s official social media channels, so be sure to follow them!hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One- Overviewhololive English 3rd Concert -All for One- Organized by: COVER Corporation / hololive production #holoAllforOne #hololiveEN Day 1 Saturday, August 23rd, 2025 (EDT) Doors open at 4:00 PM / Streaming starts at 5:30 PM / Event starts at 6:00 PM Sunday, August 24th, 2025 (EDT) Doors open at 4:00 PM / Streaming starts at 5:30 PM / Event starts at 6:00 PM Radio City Music Hall New York, NY United States Mori Calliope / Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis / IRyS / Ouro Kronii / Hakos Baelz / Shiori Novella / Koseki Bijou / Nerissa Ravencroft / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame / Gigi Murin / Cecilia Immergreen / Raora PantheraENUE TICKETS (RADIO CITY MUSIC HALL)FRONT ORCHESTRA/FRONT 1st MEZZANINE: $160 USD MIDDLE ORCHESTRA/SIDE 1st MEZZANINE: $150 USD REAR ORCHESTRA/REAR 1st MEZZANINE/FRONT 2nd MEZZANINE: $135 USD REAR 2nd MEZZANINE/REAR 3rd MEZZANINE: $95 USD1-DAY Streaming Ticket (Aug 23rd EDT) 1-DAY Streaming Ticket (Aug 24th EDT)

item.title: Hololive Vtubers Fuwamoco Sing Nekopara After Song - Siliconera

hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One-
item.author: maki
item.content:encoded: hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One- Overview COVER Corporation / hololive production / hololive EnglishMori Calliope / Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis / IRyS / Ouro Kronii / Hakos Baelz / Shiori Novella / Koseki Bijou / Nerissa Ravencroft / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame / Gigi Murin / Cecilia Immergreen / Raora Panthera#holoAllforOne #hololiveEN Saturday, August 23rd, 2025 (EDT) Doors open at 4:00 PM / Streaming starts at 5:30 PM / Event starts at 6:00 PM Sunday, August 24th, 2025 (EDT) Doors open at 4:00 PM / Streaming starts at 5:30 PM / Event starts at 6:00 PMRadio City Music Hall 1260 6th Ave 10020FRONT ORCHESTRA/FRONT 1st MEZZANINE: $160 USD MIDDLE ORCHESTRA/SIDE 1st MEZZANINE: $150 USD REAR ORCHESTRA/REAR 1st MEZZANINE/FRONT 2nd MEZZANINE: $135 USD REAR 2nd MEZZANINE/REAR 3rd MEZZANINE: $95 USD 1-DAY Streaming Ticket (Aug 23rd EDT) 1-DAY Streaming Ticket (Aug 24th EDT) 2-DAY Stream Pass

item.title: hololive English -Advent- are teaming up with SUSHIRO TAIWAN Starting June 16! | NEWS - ホロライブ公式サイト
hololive English -Advent- are teaming up with SUSHIRO TAIWAN Starting June 16!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: June 16, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced that hololive English -Advent- of hololive production, will be collaborating with SUSHIRO TAIWAN. Merchandise and theme store activities will start on June 16th and end on August 10th.hololive English -Advent- are coming to Ximending! On Friday, June 13th at 8:00 PM Local Time, hololive English -Advent- will appear on the big screen of the Watsons Wuchang store in Ximending, Taipei. Join us for this special event and be part of the excitement!SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- stores will launch on Monday, June 16th. Exclusive merchandise, themed menu items, and specially decorated stores. Don’t miss out on this exciting opportunity to enjoy delicious sushi while collecting must-have collaboration goods!The event includes exclusive gift-with-purchases, add-on purchase promotions, as well as four limited-time collaborative sushi dishes. Every order comes with a special insert card and a surprise badge from a blind bag!SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Gift[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Gift With Purchase Part 1]Event Period: Starting from June 30th, 2025 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$700 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan and clicking the Like button on the official Sushiro Facebook will receive one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- A4 file folder.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- A4 file folder*6 designs in total, randomly distributed; limited to one per transaction.[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Gift With Purchase Part 2]Event Period: Starting from July 28th, 2025 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$700 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan and clicking the Like button on the official Sushiro Facebook will receive one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Bag Clear Card.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Bag Clear Card*6 designs in total, randomly distributed; limited to one per transaction.SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Add-On[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Add-On Merchandise Promotions – Part 1]Event Period: Starting from June 16th, 2025 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$600 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan can add-on one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Pack Chibi Acrylic Standee Blind Bag for just NT$200. Spend NT$1,200 to get two for NT$400, and NT$1,800 to get three for NT$600.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Pack Chibi Acrylic Standee*6 designs in total, randomly distributed; limited to three per transaction.[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Add-On Merchandise Promotions – Part 2]Event Period: Starting from July 14th, 2025 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$600 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan can add-on one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Large Desk Mouse Pad for just NT$500. Spend NT$1,200 to get two for NT$1,000, and NT$1,800 to get three for NT$1,500.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Large Desk Mouse Pad*1 design in total; limited to three per transaction.SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Exclusive Menu ItemsCollect Insert Cards and Badges with Every Order!From June 16th, order any of the following collaboration dishes in-store at SUSHIRO TAIWAN and receive both a hololive English -Advent- insert card and a mystery badge:Salmon Tamago Roll – Shiori Novella Insert Card Meat & Egg Inari Sushi – Nerissa Ravencroft Insert Card Fried Chicken Gunkan – Koseki Bijou Insert Card Seared Shrimp Duo – FUWAMOCO (Fuwawa Abyssgard・Mococo Abyssgard) Insert CardEach talent has 2 insert card designs (Character and Fan-themed), randomly given. There are 12 badge designs, and with just NT$100, you get the dish, insert card, badge, and a chance at a special draw! Grab yours while supplies last!・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- 12 Mystery Badge BonusDive Into the World of hololive English -Advent- at Three Themed StoresExperience the magic where Virtual meets Reality at three specially-themed SUSHIRO TAIWAN locations:スシロー壽司郎 台北中華路店（TWSUSHIRO Taipei Zhonghua Road）：1F., No. 41, Sec. 1, Zhonghua Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei Cityスシロー壽司郎 台中黎明市政南店（TWSUSHIRO Taichung Liming）：No. 158, Shizheng S. 1st Rd., Nantun Dist., Taichung Cityスシロー壽司郎 高雄義享天地店（TWSUSHIRO Kaohsiung ESKY LAND）：5F., No. 115, Gushan Dist., Kaohsiung CityGet up close and personal with your favorite talents and immerse yourself in a one-of-a-kind themed dining experience!SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Lucky Draw EventStarting June 23, Bring Home Limited Goods! Win Exclusive Merchandise in Our Giveaway Event!From June 23 to August 10th, SUSHIRO TAIWAN is hosting a Giveaway Event packed with exciting prizes, rolling out in three phases! Event Period: June 23th to July 6th, 2025. Event Rules: Like the Sushiro Taiwan Facebook page and share the hololive English -Advent- collaboration menu post to enter the draw. You could win an exclusive Chibi Plush Keychain!*There will be 5 winners in total from Facebook. Event Period: Event Rules: Like the Sushiro Taiwan Facebook page, follow the official Instagram, and tag a friend you’d like to dine with at Sushiro. You could win a 3D Character EZ-Link Card Blind Box!*There will be 18 winners in total: 9 from Facebook and 6 from Instagram. Event Period: Event Rules: Leave a supportive message for hololive English -Advent- in the comments of the designated Instagram event post to enter the draw. You could win a Message Card!*There will be 8 winners in total from Instagram. These rare official merchandise items are only available through this promotion. Dine at SUSHIRO TAIWAN and test your luck—don’t miss your chance to bring home these must-have collectibles!Special Collaboration Merchandise – Pre-order Now!The “hololive English -Advent- Chibi Plush Keychains” and “ADVENT 3D iPASS Blind Boxes” are both available for pre-order now on anikoko’s official website: http://anikoko.com If you’re a fan of hololive English -Advent- don’t miss out on the pre-order period from June 16th to August 18th, 2025!

item.title: Hololive Vtubers Participate in Sleep Fighter II eSports Cup - Siliconera
Latest Hololive Nendoroid Is a Casual Usada Pekora Figure - Siliconera

World's Biggest VTubers Return to Dodger Stadium for Hololive Night 2025 - Comic Book Resources
Hololive Dodgers Vtubers and Merchandise Revealed - siliconera.com
The Dodgers x Hololive VTuber Collab Continues. This Time, With a Charming New Idea - VICE
hololive night Collaboration Event Returns to Dodger Stadium on July 5th, 2025! | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
hololive night Collaboration Event Returns to Dodger Stadium on July 5th, 2025! | NEWS | hololive official website - ホロライブ公式サイト
hololive night Collaboration Event Returns to Dodger Stadium on July 5th, 2025!
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: June 9, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN — COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan, CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) announced the second collaboration between the Los Angeles Dodgers and hololive production, taking place on Saturday, July 5th, 2025, at 4:15 PM (PDT).After a successful first collaboration with the Los Angeles Dodgers last year, “hololive night” will return to Dodgers Stadium again a second time. This year’s collaboration will feature the first-ever VTuber livestream both to and from Dodger Stadium. To furthermore commemorate this unique evening, co-branded Dodgers x hololive production merchandise will be available to purchase in the gift shops across the stadium.Fans can expect exclusive in-stadium appearances from three hololive English talents, Ninomae Ina’nis, IRyS and Koseki Bijou in real time. The hololive talents will not only cheer for the Dodgers, but also provide their sing-along version of “Take Me Out to the Ball Game” during the seventh-inning stretch of the baseball game. At the end of the game, fans will be invited to join the talents on the field, where they will host special programming such as interactive activities, and a new “WHO’S got the MOVES?!?!” segment where fans can dance and jam together to popular hololive tunes. In addition, this special event will be broadcast live to hololive English’s official YouTube channel, marking the first time ever in history for a VTuber company to stream both to and from Dodger Stadium. Fans can also enjoy a vast series of onsite hololive-themed activities, such as taking pictures with the featured talent’s cutouts, helping themselves to delicious stadium food and drinks with event-only hololive themed packaging, and more to be announced via hololive English’s official social media channels later.The hololive night ticket package includes a ticket to baseball game as well as event-exclusive Dodger x hololive production trading cards (pack of three) that feature the three main cast of this year’s event in Dodgers uniforms. Lucky fans may even draw a special version of the cards that include the talent’s printed autograph!Get hyped with us for this exciting collaboration between the Los Angeles Dodgers and hololive production! We hope to see you at the game.Official Hashtag: #hololiveDodgers・ “Play Ball!” Announcement ・ “Take Me Out to The Ball Game” Sing-a-long ・ Photo Spot with Life-size Cutouts ・ Event-Only Food & Beverage Packaging ・ holodance Crowd Dance Project ・ First-ever VTuber Livestream from the Stadium … and MORE!Collaboration Merchandise(*Products under development)Available from July 5th, 2025 in all shops inside Dodger Stadium. *While supplies last!On July 5th at Dodger Stadium, special beer, soda, and popcorn cups will be offered in hololive collaboration packaging. Please enjoy these special collaboration designs, which can only be enjoyed during hololive night.hololive night Ticket Informationhololive night Ticket Purchase Bonus: Special Trading Cards (pack of three)For the first time in history, a VTuber livestream will be held at and from Dodger Stadium. The livestream will be available on YouTube, allowing people from all over the world to experience the thrill of the event in real time. ・ Dance Project “WHO’S got the MOVES?!?!” The livestream will feature a dance project segment taking place at Dodger Stadium. Songs by hololive production talents will be played at the stadium, and those who want to try their hand at the choreography will dance together! The song selection will be announced later on hololive production’s official social media.The stream will also feature other surprises from hololive production, including past videos, so be sure to tune in! Despite her looks, Ina’nis is actually a priestess of the Ancient Ones. One day, she picked up a strange book and then started to gain the power of controlling tentacles. To her, tentacles are just a part in her ordinary life; it has never been a big deal for her. However, her girly mind does want to get them dressed up and stay pretty. After gaining power, she started hearing Ancient Whispers and Revelations. Hence, she began her VTuber activities to deliver random sanity checks on humanity, as an ordinary girl. A Nephilim who was once the embodiment of hope back in “The Paradise”. While she has left to set off on an adventure, she continues to deliver hope through her lyrics and songs, with determination in her voice. She also bears the precarious and unstable dual nature of a half-demon and half-angel; this phenomenon can be observed on rare occasions, in the form of the most unpredictably yaba—*ahem*, “surprising”, comments from IRyS herself. Bewildering those around her is but another unexpected charm of her duality. Formed from the crystallization of all forms of human emotion, Koseki Bijou is “The Jewel of Emotions.” Over years and years, emotions of beauty and filth alike have woven into her under immense pressure, resulting in an unmatched brilliance. Her ancient, mystic brilliance caused strife between the masses of the greedy, who fought over ownership of her. This led to her being imprisoned in secrecy, far from the reach of humans. It seems as though when she encounters people, and particularly their good emotions, her radiance shines even brighter.

item.title: Another Hololive Dodgers Night Will Take the Field - Siliconera
Here’s a Super Cute Hololive Idle Game. It’s Out on Steam Today. Go Nuts - VICE
Death Stranding 2 x Hololive: A Surprise Collaboration - DLCompare.com
COVER Corporation Collaborates with We's Star Ltd. for Mori Calliope themed New Liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月” | NEWS | hololive official website - ホロライブ公式サイト
COVER Corporation Collaborates with We’s Star Ltd. for Mori Calliope themed New Liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月”
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced an upcoming collaboration between VTuber agency hololive production and We’s Star Ltd. (Taichung City, Taiwan) for the new Mori Calliope themed liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月”. Following the 2023 release of “もり桜・金箔” and the 2024 release of “もり桜・一輪花” the latest creation, “もり桜・花鳥風月” will be available starting June 10th, 2025.This collaboration is a fusion of “森カリオペ” unique charm and the refined aesthetic of “花道物語” “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月” is inspired by the concept of “beautiful natural scenery,” capturing the visual and flavor profile of cherry blossoms. It delivers a unique experience characteristic of sakura liqueur.: For individual purchases, tapestry (one of the four illustration designs) will be shipped randomly.: Scheduled to start around June 2025About 重星戰略, We’s Star LTD. Aligned with the strategic rhythm of the global market, We’s Star LTD. gathers experts in prototyping, art, and marketing to create outstanding IP works with high standards. The company invests in the international market, collaborating with world-class IPs, companies, brands, and partners to build global strategies. We’s Star Official X (Twitter)： https://x.com/wesstar_corp 重星戰略企劃有限公司 / 重星戦略大阪株式会社
